signup.title: Sign up
signup.sessionSetupFailed: Account created, but session setup failed: {{message}}
signup.checkEmail: Account created. Check your email for confirmation.

orderActions.completeShippingProfile: Complete Shipping Profile before shipment creation.
orderActions.selectShippingOrigin: Select a Yalidine shipping origin before creating this shipment.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Reputation Network + COD Intelligence for Algerian merchants: decide faster using trust, fraud signals, and delivery outcomes.
overview.a11ySummary: Today's orders, pending confirmations, created shipments, delivered and failed outcomes, and reputation alerts.
overview.cardsHint: Customer Intelligence cards below surface trust, risk, reputation and delivery outcomes before any shipment decision.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Each card is a reputation-driven COD decision workspace: trust, risk, outcomes, customer behavior, and shipment execution in one place.

shipments.title: Shipments
shipments.subtitle: Shipment status updates are fully automatic via delivery provider webhooks.
shipments.empty: No shipments found for this filter.

callCenter.shipmentError: Complete shipping profile before creating shipments.
callCenter.title: Call Center Queue
callCenter.subtitle: Call the customer, then confirm or refuse. Shipment creation only appears after confirmation.

NEW.label: Fresh Orders
NEW.description: Orders that still need a first confirmation call.

CALL_LATER.label: Call Later
CALL_LATER.description: Reach back at a better time without losing the order context.

NO_ANSWER.label: No Answer
NO_ANSWER.description: Numbers that were called but did not respond.

CONFIRMED.label: Confirmed
CONFIRMED.description: Merchant-approved COD orders ready for downstream shipment work.

REFUSED.label: Refused
REFUSED.description: Orders rejected after call center review.

more.title: More
more.subtitle: Everything here supports customer intelligence, merchant decisions, delivery intelligence, and marketing intelligence.

customerIntelligence.title: Customer Intelligence
customerIntelligence.subtitle: This page centers the trust card that merchants use before they decide whether to call, confirm, or refuse an order.
customerIntelligence.trustWorkflowDesc: Every order should answer one question first: is this customer trustworthy?
customerIntelligence.authorityDesc: The network recommends, but the merchant still decides whether to confirm, verify, or refuse.
customerIntelligence.historyDesc: Delivered, refused, returned, and no-answer outcomes feed future predictions and marketing intelligence.

insights.title: Marketing Intelligence
insights.subtitle: This module extends COD and reputation outcomes into category-based growth intelligence. Full analytics screens are intentionally staged.
insights.foundationText: Future marketing intelligence will segment delivery rate, return rate, best wilaya, best courier, and campaign timing by category.
insights.lightweight: Marketing intelligence is intentionally lightweight here; the product stays centered on reputation, decisions, and delivery outcomes.

inventory.title: Inventory Intelligence
inventory.subtitle: This is a COD intelligence layer, not a warehouse ERP: stock risk is inferred from reputation-safe order behavior and delivery outcomes.
inventory.modeADesc: Uses official Woo stock, then enriches it with delivery and refusal behavior signals.
inventory.modeBDesc: Uses COD velocity plus delivery outcomes to estimate risk when raw stock is missing.
inventory.formula: Formula: Estimated days left = current stock / max(sales velocity per day, 0.1)
inventory.supportingHint: Inventory remains a supporting intelligence layer; it is not a primary workflow module.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Only useful operational events are shown for COD execution.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your workspace preferences and integrations.
settings.shippingDesc: Configure Yalidine shipment defaults for call-center orders.
settings.shippingHint: Set sender identity, origin wilaya, package defaults, and stopdesk settings once for the merchant.
settings.billingDesc: Manage your subscription and payment method.
settings.upgradeHint: Upgrade to unlock unlimited checks and advanced analytics.
settings.billingSoon: Billing integration is currently in setup. Full billing will be available soon.
settings.riskEngineDesc: Configure how the fraud detection engine evaluates orders.
settings.advancedSoon: Advanced risk engine configuration coming in a future update.
settings.privacyDesc: How customer data is stored and shared across the network.
settings.privacySafe: Global reputation stores only hashed phone numbers. Raw customer data stays in your WooCommerce database.
settings.notificationsDesc: Alert preferences for high-risk orders and system events.

onboarding.title: Merchant Onboarding Wizard
onboarding.subtitle: Stabilization onboarding for first production merchants. Complete each step in order.
onboarding.selectCategory: Select the merchant category before going live
onboarding.categoryRequired: Required before the onboarding wizard is complete.
onboarding.authorityHint: Merchant keeps final decision authority. This onboarding wizard does not change risk, reputation, or blocking behavior.

deliveryProviders.title: Delivery Providers
deliveryProviders.subtitle: Connect your delivery providers to enable delivery intelligence and reputation scoring.
deliveryProviders.zrRequiredCredentialsHint: ZR Express requires tenantHeaderName, tenantId, secretHeaderName, and secretKey
deliveryProviders.runTestBeforeSave: Run Test Connection successfully before saving Yalidine
deliveryProviders.credentialsConfigured: Credentials are already configured and encrypted.

deliverySync.title: Delivery Data Sync
deliverySync.subtitle: Sync wilayas, communes, stop desks, and shipping prices from your Yalidine account.

network.title: Customer Trust Snapshot
network.subtitle: Only merchant-safe data is shown. No merchant names, provider sources, or internal network details are exposed.

shippingProfile.title: Shipping Profile
shippingProfile.subtitle: Merchant defaults used to create real Yalidine shipments without manual overrides.
shippingProfile.defaultProductListHint: Example: 1x COD parcel, fragile goods, or your standard parcel description.
shippingProfile.stopdeskIdHint: Required when stopdesk shipping is enabled.
shippingProfile.returnCenterCodeHint: Optional if your provider supports a return-center code.
shippingProfile.autouseHint: These values will be used automatically when a merchant confirms an order in the call center.
shippingProfile.howUsedDesc: Yalidine shipment creation uses this profile as the sender origin, parcel defaults, and stopdesk settings.

stores.title: Stores
stores.subtitle: Manage your connected WooCommerce stores.
stores.emptyDesc: Install the WooCommerce plugin and connect your first store.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Use these keys to authenticate requests from the WooCommerce plugin.
apiKeys.notice: API key values are shown only once on generation. Store them securely — you cannot retrieve them again.
apiKeys.generateDesc: Create a key for your WooCommerce store integration.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Generate your first key above.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.newKeyHint: New API Key — copy it now, it will not be shown again.

checks.title: Order Checks
checks.emptyDesc: Orders will appear here once the WooCommerce plugin starts submitting them.

checkDetails.privacySafe: Privacy-safe merchant view: raw phone hashes, identity internals, fingerprint internals, and provider internals are hidden.

payments.title: Billing & Subscription
payments.subtitle: Manage your subscription plan and submit payment proof to activate your store.

plans.sectionSubtitle: Same product — the only difference is the billing cycle.

monthly.name: Monthly plan
monthly.note: Best for new stores and quick launches.
monthly.f0: Full fraud checks and network reputation scoring
monthly.f1: WooCommerce order sync and shipment automation
monthly.f2: Merchant dashboard, alerts, and review queue

yearly.name: Yearly plan
yearly.note: 12 months prepaid for a stable billing cycle.
yearly.f1: One annual renewal instead of twelve
yearly.f2: Priority support and consolidated billing review

features.sectionSubtitle: The product is the same. The difference is billing cadence and support priority.

providers.title: Available payment methods
providers.subtitle: Use the provider you already trust.

checkout.title: Submit payment proof
checkout.subtitle: Pick the provider you used, upload the receipt screenshot, and submit for review.
checkout.acceptedFiles: Accepted: PNG, JPG, WEBP, PDF. Max size: 5 MB.

history.title: Payment history
history.subtitle: All payment proof submissions for this store, newest first.

nextSteps.activeDesc: The WooCommerce plugin is authorised and processing orders.
nextSteps.expiredDesc: Submit a new payment proof below to renew and restore access.
nextSteps.rejectedDesc: Check the admin notes above, then resubmit a correct receipt.
nextSteps.pendingDesc: The team will approve or reject your request shortly. You will see the result here.
nextSteps.noneDesc: Select a plan and submit payment proof using the checkout section below.

alerts.paymentSubmittedDesc: Your receipt is queued for review. You can track the status below.
alerts.missingFile: Please upload a receipt, screenshot, or PDF before submitting.
alerts.fileTooLarge: The file is larger than 5 MB.
alerts.invalidFileType: Use PNG, JPG, WEBP, or PDF.

offline.title: No Connection
offline.subtitle: You are offline. Some features may be limited.
offline.hint: Check your internet connection and try again.

pwa.installTitle: Install DZ Fraud Shield on your home screen
pwa.installDesc: Faster loading, offline shell, and app-like navigation.
pwa.iosDesc: Tap Share then Add to Home Screen
pwa.newVersion: A new app update is available
pwa.pushBlockedHelp: Open browser settings and allow notifications. You can enable notifications later from Settings.
pwa.iosStep1: Tap the Share button (the box with an arrow pointing up) at the bottom of Safari
pwa.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
pwa.iosStep3: Tap "Add" in the top right corner
pwa.iosPushNote: Push notifications require iOS 16.4+ and the app must be installed to your home screen first.

settings.deniedHint: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings, then return here.
settings.testPushDesc: Send a test notification to this device to verify the push pipeline is working.
settings.testPushQueued: Queued — notification will arrive within 1 minute
settings.testPushRateLimit: Limit reached — max 3 test pushes per hour
settings.testPushError: Failed to enqueue — check server logs

pwaUpdate.title: A new app update is available
pwaUpdate.body: Tap Update Now to apply the latest version

subscription.blockedMessage: Please complete your payment to access this feature.
subscription.activationCodeDesc: Enter the code below in your WooCommerce plugin settings to activate your subscription.
subscription.approvedNotActivated: Payment approved — enter the activation code in your plugin to begin
subscription.renewalMessage: Your subscription has expired. Please submit a new payment screenshot to continue.
subscription.paymentInstructions: Complete your payment using one of the methods below, then upload a screenshot of your receipt.
subscription.requestPending: Your payment screenshot is under review
subscription.invalidFileType: Invalid file type (PNG, JPG, WebP, or PDF only)
